heading: View Query Limits
body:
You can view the project and federated database instance limits on queries from the
Atlas CLI, Atlas UI, and API (Application Programming Interface). You can also view the amount of data that Atlas Data Federation
processed per instance per day.

Atlas CLI

To list Data Federation query limits for your project using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas dataFederation queryLimits list [options]

```

To return the details for the Data Federation query limit you specify using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas dataFederation queryLimits describe <name> [options]

```

To learn more about the syntax and parameters for the previous commands, see the Atlas CLI documentation for
[atlas dataFederation queryLimits list](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-dataFederation-queryLimits-list) and
[atlas dataFederation queryLimits describe](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-dataFederation-queryLimits-describe).
